testCases.title: Verify that HR recruiter can successfully create a new job vacancy with all mandatory fields

steps.expected: Configured credentials should be entered successfully

steps.action: Enter Job Title "Software Engineer", Vacancy Name "SE-2024-001", select Hiring Manager, and enter Number of Positions "3"
steps.expected: All mandatory fields should be filled successfully

steps.action: Click Save button and verify vacancy appears in vacancy list
steps.expected: New job vacancy should be saved and displayed in the vacancy list
